result.stdout:
Usage: dotnet-uirtc [--project <String>] [--output <String>] [--help] [--version]

Transpile a C# project to the specified output directory.

Options:
  -p, --project <String>    Path to the project file (Xxx.csproj) (Required)
  -o, --output <String>     Output directory and file (Required)
  -h, --help                Show help message
  --version                 Show version
